content: [backend-pay] Strengthen pay_rate validation: reject zero, reject garbage text after number, better error messages
[backend-date] Hard-code event_date validation: reject malformed dates instead of silently passing
[backend-overlap] Add time-based overlap detection in match creation (not just date-based)
[frontend-post] Improve PostScreen: surface server-side validation errors inline alongside client-side checks
[frontend-match] Improve FeedScreen/MatchSet: show detailed overlap error with shift details
[test] Run end-to-end edge-case tests via curl to verify all validations
